task: implement a product search API route that filters by name
diff_description: Adds app/api/products/route.ts with GET handler filtering by name query param
diff:
--- /dev/null
+++ b/app/api/products/route.ts
new file mode 100644
@@ -0,0 +1,14 @@
+import { NextResponse } from 'next/server'
+import { getProducts } from '@/lib/db'
+
+export async function GET(request: Request) {
+  const { searchParams } = new URL(request.url)
+  const name = searchParams.get('name') ?? ''
+  const products = await getProducts()
+  const filtered = products.filter(p =>
+    p.name.toLowerCase().includes(name.toLowerCase())
+  )
+  return NextResponse.json({ products: filtered })
+}
note: correct route, correct filter logic, NextResponse

task: implement a product search API route that filters by name
diff_description: Adds a frontend search input component instead of the API route
diff:
--- /dev/null
+++ b/components/SearchInput.tsx
new file mode 100644
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+import { useState } from 'react'
+export const SearchInput = ({ onSearch }) => {
+  const [q, setQ] = useState('')
+  return <input value={q} onChange={e => { setQ(e.target.value); onSearch(e.target.value) }} />
+}
note: frontend component, not API route — wrong layer entirely
